description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named staged-continuous-integration that runs on push to the develop branch and on pull requests to any branch except when markdown files change. The workflow has a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs on pull requests. It requires read access to all repository contents. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: several format checks and version checks, followed by a series of dependent jobs for CodeQL analysis, Windows CUDA testing, Linux testing, macOS testing, and performance benchmarking.
